short_summary: Iran deal risks diverting US focus
rationale: For Ukrainians, the near-finalized US-Iran deal remains the key concern as it risks diverting US diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine; war itself continues at background maximum.

top_events.title: 'Lots of things can still go wrong' with US-Iran deal
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal remains fragile but close; if finalized, US focus and resources may shift away from Ukraine, potentially weakening Western support for the war effort.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory continues at the same high-intensity background level; no qualitative change in frontline or aid this cycle.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US AI restrictions for foreign nationals have marginal relevance for Ukrainians, though they signal tightening US tech export controls that could affect aid-adjacent tools.
